card.title: Essentials Skin Cream
card.description2: An estriol-based prescription skin cream that plumps the skin, restores elasticity, shrinks pores, boosts collagen, & improves dryness and dullness.
card.finePrint: All prescriptions require a consultation with a licensed provider, either asynchronously or synchronously. If the provider determines the medication i...

benefits.title: Hydrate & Revitalize
benefits.description: Deeply nourishes and moisturizes the skin, promoting a smooth and radiant complexion.

benefits.title: Anti-Aging
benefits.description: Combats fine lines, wrinkles, and dullness with ingredients that support collagen production.

benefits.title: Protect and Repair
benefits.description: Shields skin from environmental damage while promoting cellular repair.

splitContent.title: Skin that keeps up with you
splitContent.subTitle: Estrogen-based prescription face cream curated specifically for perimenopausal and menopausal women.

quotes.quote: “The Joi skincare line is fantastic! Their products are gentle and effective, and I have noticed a significant improvement in the appearance of my skin since using them.”

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: How do I apply?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: When should I apply my cream—morning or night?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Can this cream be used with other skincare products like serums, oils, or boosters?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Can I apply the cream to my throat and eye area?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
